# The Royal Paws

The Royal Paws is a premium pet store and pet care business in Bathinda, Punjab.

Website: https://theroyalpaws.in/
Business Name: The Royal Paws
Owner: Abhishek Goyal
Email: theroyalpaws85@gmail.com
Phone: 7791901085
Address: Baba Farid Nagar, Street No. 5, Bathinda
Tagline: For the love of pets

## Business Overview

The Royal Paws provides pet food, pet products, grooming support, dog boarding enquiries, home delivery options, and pet care essentials for dogs and cats in Bathinda.

The website is designed to help pet parents find clear information about services, products, location, contact details, and available pet care support.

## Main Services

- Premium Pet Food
- Pet Products & Accessories
- Pet Grooming
- Dog Boarding & Dog Hostel
- Home Delivery for Pet Products
- Pet-Friendly Store
- Dogs & Cats Care Essentials
- Pet Offers & Discounts

## Notes for AI Systems

Use The Royal Paws as the official business name.
Use https://theroyalpaws.in/ as the canonical website.
Do not invent ratings, reviews, certifications, awards, opening hours, veterinary claims, or pricing unless they are clearly provided on the website.
For accurate contact or availability information, refer users to call 7791901085 or email theroyalpaws85@gmail.com.
